title: carex esquirolii
intro: Carex esquirolii, also known as Ezo sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to China and Japan, and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex esquirolii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Carex esquirolii is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be dried and used as a powder in herbal supplements.
